name: geo-chart
description: Unified geographic/map chart component supporting all variations: default, GDP, population, interactive, and labeled configurations

data.name: data
data.description: Array of country data with names and values. Example: [{name: 'United States', value: 500}, {name: 'China', value: 450}]

visualMapMin.name: visualMapMin
visualMapMin.description: Minimum value for the visual map scale. Example: 0

visualMapMax.name: visualMapMax
visualMapMax.description: Maximum value for the visual map scale. Example: 1000

colors.name: colors
colors.description: Array of colors for the gradient scale. Example: ['#91cc75', '#5470c6', '#ee6666']

tooltipFormatter.name: tooltipFormatter
tooltipFormatter.description:
Custom tooltip formatter string. Use ECharts formatter syntax: '{b}' for name, '{c}' for value. Example: '{b}
GDP: ${c}B'

showLabel.name: showLabel
showLabel.description: Whether to show country name labels on the map. Example: false

roam.name: roam
roam.description: Enable pan and zoom interactions. Can be true (pan and zoom), false (disabled), 'scale' (zoom only), or 'move' (pan only). Example: false

visualMapText.name: visualMapText
visualMapText.description: Visual map text labels. Array of two strings: [high label, low label]. Example: ['High', 'Low']

seriesName.name: seriesName
seriesName.description: Series name for the map data. Example: 'GDP'

width.name: width
width.description: Width of the chart in pixels. Example: 220

height.name: height
height.description: Height of the chart in pixels. Example: 350
